description_long: This is a round frying pan with a hammered copper-colored body and a long, straight metallic handle attached to one side. The pan contains a cooked sunny-side-up egg, with a bright yellow yolk surrounded by a white, slightly uneven egg white. The copper pan has a slightly irregular, faceted rim, giving it a hand-forged appearance. The handle is metallic, rectangular in cross-section, and appears to be securely riveted to the pan. The interior of the pan is smooth, with no visible nonstick coating or additional features. There are no visible brand markings, hanging holes, or decorative elements on the handle or pan body.
description: A hammered copper-colored frying pan with a straight metallic handle, containing a cooked sunny-side-up egg. The pan has a faceted rim and a smooth interior.
description_view_0: The pan is seen from a side angle, showing the copper body, the cooked egg inside, and the straight metallic handle extending to the right.
description_view_1: This view highlights the pan's round shape, the egg's position near the center, and the handle extending leftward.
description_view_2: The handle is fully visible, extending straight out, and the pan's faceted rim and egg are clearly seen from above.
description_view_3: The pan is viewed from the opposite side, showing the handle extending away and the egg positioned off-center within the pan.
attribute_handle_type: Single, straight, metallic handle with a rectangular cross-section, no visible grip texture or covering, not ergonomic or detachable.
attribute_rim_design: Faceted, medium-thick rim with a slightly irregular, hammered appearance; no pouring spouts or reinforced edges.
attribute_bottom_pattern: Smooth bottom surface with a hammered, faceted texture; no visible patterns, ridges, or brand stamps.
